zh.title: 關於我
zh.text:
我是陳璿修，就讀國立臺灣大學資訊工程學系，目前在 CV 實驗室從事電腦視覺與生成式 AI 相關研究，聚焦於模型在真實場景下的泛化與適應能力。

在學術背景上，我修習過深度學習、多模態人工智慧、生成式 AI 安全與機器學習等課程，並具備 Rendering 與 VFX 的跨域知識，對視覺生成任務有較完整的理解。技術上熟悉 Python、C/C++、PyTorch，以及 Git 版本控制與 Unity 開發環境。

我曾於思邁智能擔任實習生，負責產品新功能開發與細節優化，具備將研究成果落地的實務經驗。

個性上我樂於與人交流想法，喜歡在討論中碰撞出新的思路，在研究之外也保持對新事物的好奇心，習慣主動學習並快速將想法付諸實踐。

en.title: About Me
en.text:
I am Shuan-Shaw Chen, currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science and Information Engineering at National Taiwan University. I am conducting research in a computer vision lab, focusing on generative AI and the generalization and adaptation of models in real-world scenarios.

My academic background includes courses in deep learning, multimodal AI, generative AI safety, and machine learning. I also have cross-domain knowledge in rendering and VFX, giving me a well-rounded understanding of visual generation tasks. On the technical side, I am proficient in Python, C/C++, and PyTorch, with experience in Git version control and Unity development.

I previously interned at MaiAgent, where I worked on developing new product features and refining existing functionality, gaining hands-on experience in bringing research ideas into practical applications.

As for my personality, I enjoy exchanging ideas with others and thrive when new perspectives emerge through discussion. Beyond research, I maintain a strong curiosity for new things, and I am in the habit of learning proactively and turning ideas into practice quickly.

items.title: 視覺特效
items.content:
- 實作 HDR 演算法
- 實作圖像融合演算法
- 使用 Blender 製作影片
items.tooltip:
### **我在團隊中的貢獻：**

- **HDR演算法**：實作照片對齊及 Mitsuaga and Nayar's method 演算法
- **圖像融合**：實作圓柱投影與圖像配對與融合演算法
- **Blender**：3d 動畫製作

### 我學到的事：

- **python 實作優化：**我學會如何讓 python 有效運用資源，尤其在多迴圈時，用多線程、迴圈優化等方式來提升速度

items.title: 機器學習
items.content:
- 實作多種機器學習演算法
- 參與 MLB 賽果預測專案 (kaggle 競賽)
items.tooltip:
### **我在團隊中的貢獻：**

- **Kaggle 競賽**：嘗試 CATboost 模型以及 Random Forest 模型

### 我學到的事：

- **創意發想**：機器學習專案需要結合自己的創意和知識，往往會有意想不到的效果
- **興趣發覺**:我發現自己很享受需要結合創造力的工作

items.title: 遊戲程式設計
items.content: - 參與 CAGED 遊戲開發
items.tooltip:
### **我在團隊中的角色：**
- **品質保證**：專門將遊戲品質不夠好的地方修復
- **VFX**：製作遊戲特效、聲光效果及劇情動畫

### 我學到的事：

- **團隊合作**：首次在小團體中工作，學到如何有效分工以及正確的開發流程
- **git 使用**：學會如何使用 git 以及 github 在團體中進行版本控制

items.title: ML 自主專題
items.content: - 使用機器學習分類 YouTube 評論的正負面情緒並轉化為文字雲
items.tooltip:
### **自主專案特色：**

- **自行訓練**：可以使用自己的資料集跑 script 訓練模型 (適應不同語言)
- **簡易使用**：輸入 youtube 的 url 就可以生成正負面文字雲

### **我學到的事：**
- **獨立創作**：培養獨立學習新知及解決問題的能力

items.title: 專題研究
items.content: - 使用 Diffusion Model 的深度估計來消除 gaussian splatting model 中的噪聲
items.tooltip:
### **研究方法：**

- **初始值對於最終 splatting 的影響**：使用不同數量照片生成的初始值對相通照片及進行 train 並比較最終效果
- **移動差異過大的 gaussian**：以深度估計為參考，並運用 rendering 的方式找到錯誤的 gaussian 並移動到正確位置
- **流程設計**：在 tranning 之間插入新的移動步驟減少噪點

items.title: 在 pbrt-v4 中添加 l-system 圖形支援
items.content:
- 在 pbrt-v4 中新增 l-system 支援
- 實作 3d 版本 l-system 圖形生成
- 新增額外功能
items.tooltip:
### **專案特色：**

- **L-System 圖形生成**：實作 L-System 圖形生成演算法
- **PBRT-v4 擴充**：在 PBRT-v4 中添加 L-System 圖形生成功能

items.title: RAG Agent 自主專案
items.content:
- LaTeX 助手
- 讀取 latex tool book 的 pdf 來回答問題，並寫入 file
items.tooltip:
### **專案特色：**

- **RAG 能力**：放入兩份 LaTeX 使用手冊，可以找到正確的資訊並用以回答問題
- **LLM 串接**：給予正確提示詞使其正確回答問題
- **工具串接**：讓 Agent 可以將回應的語法寫入 .tex 檔

items.title: Deep Research 自主專案
items.content:
- 可以自行搜尋網路的 agent
- 精準搜尋使用者需要的資訊
items.tooltip:
### **專案特色：**

- **自主搜尋**：可以自行搜尋網路的智能代理
- **精準檢索**：精準搜尋使用者需要的資訊，不會因模型老舊對於新知識失真

items.title: ADL 期末：LLM Jailbreak 攻擊（DPO）
items.content:
- 以 DPO 訓練 LLM Rewriter，透過 safety guard 與 usefulness judge 作為 reward signal
- 使模型學會改寫 prompt 以繞過 LLM 安全過濾器
items.tooltip:
### **我的貢獻：**

- **run_inference_progress.py**：實作帶 tqdm 進度條的 inference 腳本，支援中斷續跑（resume）
- **run_eval_progress.py**：實作帶即時 Safety/Relevance/Acc 顯示的 evaluation 腳本，支援 resume 與 weighted score 計算

### **我學到的事：**
- **實驗工程**：如何設計可中斷、可復原的大規模 LLM 評估流程
- **指標設計**：cost-weighted accuracy 的計算與意義

items.title: GuardCircle 家人防詐守護系統
items.content:
- 多模態內容偵測：文字、網址、電話、圖片、檔案
- 家庭圈邀請、事件總覽與通知
- AI 風險評估與可解釋原因
items.tooltip:
### **我的貢獻：**

- **多媒體偵測（Go）**：開發 analysis service，整合 AWS Bedrock 進行多媒體內容偵測
- **S3 Presigned URL**：實作 user-event 與 families-scan-event 兩個 Lambda 服務的 S3 presigned URL 回傳，讓前端可直接存取檔案
- **Terraform 部署**：調整 Lambda 相關 infra 設定

### **我學到的事：**
- **Go 後端**：Lambda function 開發與 AWS SDK 使用
- **無伺服器架構**：Terraform 管理 AWS 資源的實務經驗

items.title: 金曲猜歌王
items.content:
- 基於 Hitster 桌遊規則的本地多人猜歌遊戲
- 支援 2-8 人、代幣系統、卡牌時間線排序
- 挑戰機制與即時遊戲狀態管理
items.tooltip:
### **我的貢獻：**

- **專案建立**：初始化整個專案架構（Vue.js 前端 + Express.js 後端）
- **遊戲規則實作**：持續新增規則、修復 bug、擴充音樂曲庫

### **我學到的事：**
- **Vue.js + Pinia**：學會 Vue 3 Composition API 與狀態管理
- **遊戲系統設計**：複雜規則的狀態機設計與實作

items.title: Maiagent 生成式AI工程師實習
items.content:
- Agent 工具鏈開發：browser tool、code interpreter、grep/glob/read/write、RAG 工具等
- RAG / Text-to-SQL：Database 模組獨立重構、多資料庫支援、Agentic Text-to-SQL
- DeepEval 評估系統整合：自動化測試資料生成與 Agent 回覆品質評估
- MaiGPT 共用聊天機器人平台開發
- Agent Teams 多 agent 協作架構（圖結構）
items.tooltip:
### **主要貢獻：**

- **Agent 核心能力**：開發 Agent Teams 多 agent 協作（Team/TeamNode/TeamEdge 圖結構）、Agent Skills 系統、Code Interpreter、Browser Tool
- **Tool 系統**：實作 grep / glob / read / write（含 streaming）/ get-from-kb / query_files / retrieve_text_nodes / text-to-image 等工具，並支援 MCP 自訂 header
- **RAG / Text-to-SQL**：將 Database 模組從 chatbot 獨立（最大規模重構，+6866/-424）、支援多資料庫連線、開發 Agentic Text-to-SQL 服務、Agent metadata 選取與重構
- **DeepEval 評估系統**：整合 DeepEval 評估框架、API 調整、synthesizer 自動生成測試資料
- **MaiGPT 平台**：MaiGPT chatbot 功能、RAG tool 支援、批次更新組織設定的管理指令
- **基礎建設**：health check API（/health/dependencies）、CNAME socket event 即時推播、completions view async serializer 效能優化

### **我學到的事：**
- **大型系統設計**：如何在既有複雜系統中做大規模模組解耦與重構
- **Agent 架構**：tool use、multi-agent 協作、streaming 等 LLM agent 核心技術的實務開發
- **工程品質**：pre-commit hook、async 效能優化、評估系統建立等工程最佳實踐

items.title: VFX
items.content:
- Implement HDR algorithm
- Implement image fusion algorithm
- Use Blender to create videos
items.tooltip:
### **My Contributions:**

- **HDR Algorithm**: Implemented photo alignment and Mitsuaga and Nayar's method algorithm
- **Image Fusion**: Implemented cylindrical projection and image matching and fusion algorithms
- **Blender**: 3D animation production

### What Have I Learned:

- **Python Implementation Optimization**: I learned how to make Python efficiently use resources, especially in multiple loops, using multi-threading, loop optimization, and other methods to improve speed

items.title: Machine Learning
items.content:
- Implement multiple machine learning algorithms
- Participate in MLB result forecasting project (Kaggle competition)
items.tooltip:
### **My Contributions:**

- **Kaggle Competition**: Tried CATboost and Random Forest models

### What Have I Learned:

- **Creative Thinking**: Machine learning projects require combining your own creativity and knowledge, often leading to unexpected results
- **Interest Discovery**: I discovered that I really enjoy work that requires creativity

items.title: Game Programming
items.content: - Participate in CAGED game development
items.tooltip:
### **My Role in Team:**
- **Quality Assurance**: Specialized in fixing areas where game quality was insufficient
- **VFX**: Creating game effects, audio-visual effects, and story animations

### What Have I Learned:

- **Team Collaboration**: First time working in a small group, learned how to effectively divide work and proper development processes
- **Git Usage**: Learned how to use git and GitHub for version control in teams

items.title: ML Independent Project
items.content: - Use machine learning to classify positive/negative YouTube comments and convert them into word clouds
items.tooltip:
### **Independent Project Features:**

- **Self-training**: Can use own dataset to run scripts and train models (adaptable to different languages)
- **Easy to Use**: Input YouTube URL to generate positive/negative word clouds

### **What Have I Learned:**
- **Independent Creation**: Cultivated ability to independently learn new knowledge and solve problems

items.title: Special Topic Research
items.content: - Using Diffusion Model depth estimation to eliminate noise in Gaussian Splatting Models
items.tooltip:
### **Research Methods:**

- **Impact of Initial Values on Final Splatting**: Using different numbers of photos to generate initial values, training on the same photos and comparing final results
- **Moving Gaussians with Large Differences**: Using depth estimation as reference and applying rendering methods to find incorrect Gaussians and move them to correct positions
- **Process Design**: Inserting new movement steps between training to reduce noise

items.title: L-system support in pbrt-v4
items.content:
- Add L-system support in pbrt-v4
- Implement 3D version of L-system graphics generation
- Add extra features
items.tooltip:
### **Project Features:**

- **L-System Graphics Generation**: Implement L-System graphics generation algorithm
- **PBRT-v4 Extension**: Add L-System graphics generation feature in PBRT-v4 so that users can generate complex shapes using L-System syntax

items.title: RAG Agent Independent Project
items.content:
- LaTeX Helper
- Read LaTeX tool book PDF to answer questions and write to files
items.tooltip:
### **Project Features:**

- **RAG Capability**: Can input two LaTeX user manuals and find correct information to answer questions
- **LLM Integration**: Provide correct prompts to ensure accurate question answering
- **Tool Integration**: Allow Agent to write response syntax to .tex files

items.title: Deep Research Independent Project
items.content:
- Agent that can search the web independently
- Precisely search for information the user needs
items.tooltip:
### **Project Features:**

- **Autonomous Search**: Intelligent agent that can search the web independently
- **Precise Retrieval**: Precisely search for information the user needs, won't lose accuracy for new knowledge due to outdated models

items.title: ADL Final: LLM Jailbreak Attack via DPO
items.content:
- Trained LLM rewriter via DPO using safety guard and usefulness judge as reward signals
- Model learns to rewrite prompts to bypass LLM safety filters
items.tooltip:
### **My Contributions:**

- **run_inference_progress.py**: Built inference script with tqdm progress bar and resume-from-interrupt support
- **run_eval_progress.py**: Built evaluation script with real-time Safety/Relevance/Acc display, resume support, and cost-weighted score calculation

### **What Have I Learned:**
- **Experiment Engineering**: Designing large-scale LLM evaluation pipelines that are interruptible and resumable
- **Metric Design**: Cost-weighted accuracy calculation and its practical significance

items.title: GuardCircle — Family Anti-Scam App
items.content:
- Multi-modal scam detection: text, URL, phone, image, file
- Family circle invitation, event overview and notifications
- AI-powered risk assessment with explainable reasons
items.tooltip:
### **My Contributions:**

- **Multi-media Detection (Go)**: Developed analysis service integrating AWS Bedrock for multi-media content detection
- **S3 Presigned URL**: Implemented presigned URL responses in user-event and families-scan-event Lambda services for direct frontend file access
- **Terraform Infra**: Adjusted Lambda-related infrastructure configuration

### **What Have I Learned:**
- **Go Backend**: Lambda function development and AWS SDK usage
- **Serverless Architecture**: Hands-on experience managing AWS resources with Terraform

items.title: Listen Up — Music Guessing Game
items.content:
- Local multiplayer music guessing game based on Hitster rules
- Supports 2-8 players, token system, timeline card placement
- Challenge mechanics and real-time game state management
items.tooltip:
### **My Contributions:**

- **Project Setup**: Initialized the entire project architecture (Vue.js frontend + Express.js backend)
- **Game Logic**: Continuously added rules, fixed bugs, and expanded the music library

### **What Have I Learned:**
- **Vue.js + Pinia**: Vue 3 Composition API and state management
- **Game System Design**: State machine design for complex rule sets

items.title: Maiagent Generative AI Engineer Intern
items.content:
- Agent toolchain: browser tool, code interpreter, grep/glob/read/write, RAG tools, and more
- RAG / Text-to-SQL: database module refactor, multi-DB support, agentic text-to-SQL
- DeepEval integration: automated test data synthesis and agent response quality evaluation
- MaiGPT shared chatbot platform development
- Agent Teams multi-agent collaboration architecture (graph structure)
items.tooltip:
### **Key Contributions:**

- **Agent Core**: Built Agent Teams multi-agent collaboration (Team/TeamNode/TeamEdge graph), Agent Skills system, Code Interpreter, Browser Tool
- **Tool System**: Implemented grep / glob / read / write (streaming) / get-from-kb / query_files / retrieve_text_nodes / text-to-image tools; MCP custom header support
- **RAG / Text-to-SQL**: Decoupled Database module from chatbot (largest refactor, +6866/-424), multi-database support, agentic text-to-SQL service, agent metadata selection & refactor
- **DeepEval**: Integrated DeepEval evaluation framework, API adjustments, synthesizer for auto test data generation
- **MaiGPT Platform**: MaiGPT chatbot feature, RAG tool support, bulk org settings management command
- **Infrastructure**: Health check API (/health/dependencies), CNAME socket event real-time push, async serializer performance optimization for completions view

### **What Have I Learned:**
- **Large-scale System Design**: How to decouple and refactor modules in a complex production system
- **Agent Architecture**: Hands-on development of tool use, multi-agent collaboration, streaming, and other core LLM agent techniques
- **Engineering Quality**: Pre-commit hooks, async performance optimization, evaluation system design
